title: ATLAS · Stock OHLC price series
description: Stock OHLCV + adjusted close + volume fixture (frontend-v1 spec §10.5.7 — `reliance_close_5y.json` sample). Consumed by Stock detail (§7) chart and the §10.5 Signal Playback embed when the instrument is a single stock. Stage 2 source: `/api/v1/stocks/{symbol}/prices?range=5y` or `/api/v1/stocks/{symbol}/chart-data`. Every number is Decimal-representable to 4 decimal places.

exchange.description: Primary listing venue for this price series. Most ATLAS flows prefer NSE; BSE included for completeness.

isin.description: ISO 6166 ISIN code. 12 chars: 2-letter country + 9 alphanumeric + 1 check digit.

company_name.description: Optional full company name for display (hero strip on Stock detail).

data_as_of.description: Most recent trading session in the fixture (ISO YYYY-MM-DD, IST). Matches the last `series[].date`.

adjustment_as_of.description: Optional date through which `adj_close` is adjusted for splits/bonuses. Corporate actions after this date have NOT been back-applied.

series.description: Daily OHLCV rows, ascending by `date`. Typical 5Y sample is approximately 1,250 rows (NSE trading days). Rows are present only for trading sessions — never fill forward for holidays.

open.description: Session open in rupees, 4 decimal places.

high.description: Session high in rupees, 4 decimal places. Must satisfy `high >= max(open, close, low)`.

low.description: Session low in rupees, 4 decimal places. Must satisfy `low <= min(open, close, high)`.

close.description: Session close in rupees, 4 decimal places (raw, NOT adjusted).

adj_close.description: Close adjusted for splits and bonuses through `adjustment_as_of`. Use this series — not `close` — for any return/backtest calculation. Dividends are NOT included (price-return basis).

delivery_volume.description: Optional delivery-based volume (shares that settled T+2, non-intraday). When present must satisfy `<= volume`.

turnover.description: Optional traded turnover on `date` in rupees (volume × VWAP), 2 decimal places.
